description_long: This object is a baseball bat with a classic tapered cylindrical shape, featuring a rounded knob at the handle end and a slightly wider barrel at the opposite end. The bat is primarily colored in shades of green, blue, orange, and brown, with visible segmented sections and large, dark numbers printed vertically along the barrel. The handle area is lighter, resembling a natural wood tone, while the knob is dark, possibly black, and appears to be made of a different material. The surface finish is smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a lacquered or varnished wood construction. There are no visible brand logos or manufacturer names, but the segmented color pattern and numbers give it a distinctive, almost decorative appearance.
description: A multi-colored baseball bat with segmented sections, large numbers on the barrel, and a smooth, glossy finish. The handle is lighter and the knob is dark, giving it a visually striking look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bat's barrel with large numbers and a clear segmentation of colors, with the knob and handle visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the segmented color pattern without visible numbers, showing the smooth taper from barrel to handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays more numbers and color segments, with the handle and knob clearly visible at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the segmented color pattern, similar to view 1, with no visible numbers.
attribute_barrel_markings: Large, dark numbers (7, 8, 1) printed vertically on the barrel in a bold font, spaced along the segmented color sections.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is rounded, black, and smooth, appearing to be made of a different material than the rest of the bat, with no visible logos or markings.
